title: Rubio dismisses Iran peace proposal; rules out deal without nuclear provisions
snippet: Secretary of State Rubio ruled out any deal excluding Iran's nuclear program. Must 'definitively prevent Iran from sprinting towards a nuclear weapon.' Directly contradicts Iran's proposal to postpone nuclear talks. Makes current Hormuz-first approach unacceptable to US.
tag_reason: 루비오의 이란 제안 공식 거부 및 핵 포함 요구는 5/1 신규 외교적 포지션
